mapper.select: SELECT id, pw, name, email, tel, resdate, point, per, profile_image_path AS profileImagePath, status FROM tbl_member WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, pw, name, email, tel, resdate, point, per, profile_image_path AS profileImagePath, status FROM tbl_member
(id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY resdate DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_member WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_member (id, pw, name, email, tel, per) VALUES (#{id}, #{pw}, #{name}, #{email}, #{tel}, #{per})
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_member SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, tel = #{tel} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_member WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id FROM tbl_member WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_member SET pw = #{pw} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tbl_member SET profile_image_path = #{profileImagePath} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tbl_member SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tbl_member SET point = point + #{amount} WHERE id = #{id}
